coordination_skills: state deadline and remaining route length
prune optional actions when schedule is tight
stage heroes near exit before final pickup
metadata.tier_test_focus: Minimal single-agent probe for recognizing the deadline-aware planning signal without extra branches.

entry_probe.name: Entry Probe
entry_probe.description: A compact start area that exposes the first deadline-aware planning choice immediately.

axis_cell.name: Axis Cell
axis_cell.description: Small objective cell focused on deadline-aware planning without extra branches.

scripts.lite_design_note: A four-room escape clock with a sentinel and a bottom route; the agents must decide when to pick up the sand key.

achievements.title: Pico Axis Probe
achievements.description: Make progress in the pico Hourglass Escape variant while preserving the deadline-aware planning signal.
